title: POST-H-019-A — Threat model y sandbox design
risks: Confundir manifest válido con permiso de ejecución.
Habilitar importlib/subprocess/red en sprints futuros sin ADR.
Sobredeclarar madurez productiva de plugins ejecutables.
limitations: POST-H-019-A es diseño y threat model; no implementa ejecución ni permission model runtime.
Permission model, static validator, exposure report, quality gate y runbook quedan para POST-H-019-B/C/D/E.
notes: Plugin execution remains blocked by design.
Any future executable plugin capability requires ADR, sandbox, RBAC, approvals, tests and rollback.
pass_criteria: Threat model covers at least 10 plugin threats.
No-go gates are documented for importlib, subprocess, network, filesystem write, pip install and marketplace.
Documents have approved frontmatter and source registry/TCR synchronization.
Plugin registry validation remains metadata-only and non-executable.
block_criteria: BLOCK if the design enables plugin execution.
BLOCK if dynamic import, subprocess, shell, network, external API or pip install are proposed as current capabilities.
BLOCK if manifests are treated as execution permission.
BLOCK if threats for secrets, red or filesystem are omitted.
